name: Puzzle — match-3 swap
description: Grid match-3 in Phaser: click two adjacent tiles to swap, matches of 3+ clear and score, board refills.
brief: Make a match-3 puzzle game on a grid of colored tiles. Click one tile then an adjacent tile to swap them. Any line of three or more same-colored tiles clears, the score increases, and tiles above fall to fill the gaps. There is no fail state; the player aims for a high score.
